PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 30, 2021, is admitted to probate. Robert Schmitt is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing on filing the final Inventory and Appraisal is set for February 2, 2026. No appearance will be necessary if the final Inventory and Appraisal is filed two weeks prior. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for September 28, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
